mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = 1 AND last_heartbeat >= #{activeThreshold}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, password, nickname, avatar_url, status, last_heartbeat, created_at) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, #{lastHeartbeat,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, last_heartbeat = #{lastHeartbeat,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler} WHERE username = #{username} AND (last_heartbeat IS NULL OR last_heartbeat < #{lastHeartbeat,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
